NAVAREA XIX 128/18
BARENTS SEA

1. DUE TO MISSILE AND ARTILLERY FIRING THE USE OF THE FOLLOWING TRAFFIC SEPARATION SCHEME AND RECOMMENDED ROUTES ARE TEMPORARILY SUSPENDED FROM 060000 TO 091900 UTC NOV 18:
A. TSS OFF SLETTNES
B. RECOMMENDED ROUTE BETWEEN TSS OFF VARDOE AND TSS OFF SLETTNES.
C. RECOMMENDED ROUTE BETWEEN TSS OFF SLETTNES AND TSS OFF NORTH CAPE

2. NORWEGIAN COASTAL WARNING 611, 617 AND NAVAREA XIX 126/18 REFERS
3. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 092000 UTC NOV 18
